title: Hit-and-Run Suspect Arrested After Child Injured
summary: Shaiquailalia Di Ndia Lashi Harris arrested for felony hit-and-run after an 8-year-old was struck by a vehicle near Quail Hollow Middle School.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers to pedestrians and the importance of holding drivers accountable for their actions.

title: Multiple Arrests in North Charlotte Drug Trafficking Case
summary: Federal and local operations lead to multiple arrests on drug trafficking and firearms charges in north Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the ongoing issue of drug-related crime and the collaborative efforts to combat it.

title: Charlotte Douglas Airport Receives $46.9M for Expansion
summary: The FAA awards Charlotte Douglas $46.9M to expand the airport apron, part of a nationwide effort to modernize aviation infrastructure.
charlotte_impact: Improves airport capacity and safety, contributing to economic growth and travel convenience.

title: Sonic Boom Rattles South Carolina, Cause Unknown
summary: USGS identifies South Carolina's 'rumble' as a sonic boom, but the cause remains undetermined, affecting areas from Irmo to Florence.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates unexplained natural phenomena and their impact on local communities.

title: Nonprofit Empowers Teens Through Leadership Program
summary: Step Up to Leadership prepares for a youth-led event focused on violence prevention, mental health, and positive decision-making.
charlotte_impact: Highlights community-based solutions to address youth violence and promote mental well-being.

title: Fatal Single-Vehicle Crash in Rock Hill
summary: A 50-year-old woman died in a crash on Red River Road in Rock Hill after her vehicle hit a fence and overturned.
charlotte_impact: Serves as a reminder of road safety and the potential consequences of vehicle accidents.

title: Charlotte Man Charged in 2024 Home Invasion
summary: Aaron Deunte Ratliff charged in a 2024 Anson County home invasion after DNA evidence linked him to the crime.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the effectiveness of forensic science in solving violent crimes.

title: Person Drowns in Lake Wylie
summary: Emergency crews responded to Lake Wylie for a boater who failed to resurface after jumping into the water on Thursday afternoon.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of water activities and the importance of safety precautions.

title: Teacher Arrested, Placed on Leave
summary: A Lewisville Middle School teacher was arrested and put on administrative leave after an off-campus incident.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about teacher conduct and the impact on the school community.

title: South Carolinians Concerned About Economy
summary: Winthrop Poll reveals financial struggles in South Carolina, with many citing soaring costs for necessities.
charlotte_impact: Reflects the economic challenges faced by residents and their impact on daily life.

title: Cooler and Drier Weather Forecast
charlotte_impact: Provides a brief weather update relevant to local residents.

title: Teen Charged with Attempted Murder in Walmart Shooting
summary: A 17-year-old faces attempted first-degree murder charges after a Walmart shooting in northwest Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Addresses gun violence and its impact on public safety, particularly involving young people.

title: Survey: Professionals Regret College Degrees Due to Debt
summary: Many US professionals regret their college degrees amid student debt concerns and the high price of tuition.
charlotte_impact: Raises questions about the value of higher education and the burden of student loan debt.

title: Clover Police Officer Arrested for Domestic Violence
summary: Mara Anderton, a Clover police officer, is facing charges of domestic violence and resisting arrest.
charlotte_impact: Addresses issues of domestic violence and accountability within law enforcement.

title: Car Break-ins Plague Clover Neighborhood
summary: Thieves target a quiet Clover neighborhood in a string of car break-ins, with at least one gun stolen.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the vulnerability of communities to property crime and the potential for further violence.
